message.content:
Read and analyze the following files from /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place (feature/SPMAIS-32275_ branch) to understand the "Detalhes do pedido" (Order Details) feature implementation:

1. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/Models/index.ts
2. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/index.tsx
3. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/utils.ts
4. src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/view.tsx
5. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx
6. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts
7. src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx

Summarize:
- The screen structure (Hook Component pattern compliance)
- Dependencies and imports
- Business logic and handlers
- Any issues or patterns that don't match the STYLE_GUIDE.md

content.text: I'll analyze the Order Details feature implementation from the specified files. Let me read them all in parallel.

content.content:
1→import { Box, Text, TagLabel, Button, BackDropBottom, SeparatorHorizontal, CardActivity, DetailTransactionValue, Alert } from '@semparar/design-system-app';
     2→import { PropsModalizeRef } from '@semparar/design-system-app/src/@types/modelize';
     3→import React, { FC } from 'react';
     4→import { Linking, ActivityIndicator } from 'react-native';
     5→import theme from '../../styles/theme';
     6→import BasicScreen from '../../atomic/templates/BasicScreen';
     7→import ApiError from '../../atomic/organisms/ApiError';
     8→import { eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
     9→import { MyOrdersDetailProps, STATUS_COLORS } from './Models';
    10→
    11→const MyOrdersDetailView: FC<MyOrdersDetailProps> = ({
    12→  handleGoBack,
    13→  transaction,
    14→  modalizeRef,
    15→  modalizeRefInfo,
    16→  handleOpenReportProblem,
    17→  handleCloseReportProblem,
    18→  handleOpenInfo,
    19→  handleCloseInfo,
    20→  isLoading,
    21→  hasError,
    22→  handleRetry,
    23→  isCashback,
    24→  cardTitle,
    25→  formattedPointsValue,
    26→  highlightText,
    27→  formattedCurrencyValue,
    28→  marketplaceContent,
    29→  showOrderNumber,
    30→  showStatus,
    31→  showValue,
    32→  height,
    33→}) => {
    34→
    35→  if (hasError) {
    36→    return (
    37→      <BasicScreen
    38→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    39→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    40→        errorButtonOnPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    41→      >
    42→        <ApiError
    43→          title="Algo deu errado!"
    44→          subTitle="Por favor, tente de novo."
    45→          isLoading={isLoading}
    46→          onPress={handleRetry || (() => {})}
    47→        />
    48→      </BasicScreen>
    49→    );
    50→  }
    51→
    52→  if (isLoading && !transaction) {
    53→    return (
    54→      <BasicScreen
    55→        title="Detalhes do pedido"
    56→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
    57→        hasScroll
    58→        errorButtonOnPress={() => {}}
    59→      >
    60→        <Box flex={1} justify="center" align="center" minHeight={400}>
    61→          <ActivityIndicator size="large" color={theme.colors.BRAND_BASE_01} />
    62→        </Box>
    63→      </BasicScreen>
    64→    );
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  if (!transaction) {
    68→    return null;
    69→  }
    70→
    71→  const renderDivider = () => {
    72→    return (
    73→      <SeparatorHorizontal
    74→        borderWidth="smaller"
    75→        borderColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
    76→        height={1}
    77→        width="100%"
    78→        mt="xxxxs"
    79→      />
    80→    );
    81→  };
    82→
    83→  const renderMarketplaceContent = () => {
    84→    if (!marketplaceContent) return null;
    85→
    86→    return (
    87→      <>
    88→        <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    89→          Número do pedido
    90→        </Text>
    91→        <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
    92→          #{marketplaceContent.orderNumber}
    93→        </Text>
    94→        {marketplaceContent.status && (
    95→          <>
    96→            {renderDivider()}
    97→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
    98→              Status do pedido
    99→            </Text>
   100→            <TagLabel
   101→              type={(marketplaceContent.statusColor as any) || 'neutral'}
   102→              text={marketplaceContent.status}
   103→              showSpacing
   104→            />
   105→          </>
   106→        )}
   107→        {marketplaceContent.paymentType && (
   108→          <>
   109→            {renderDivider()}
   110→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   111→              Forma de pagamento
   112→            </Text>
   113→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   114→              {marketplaceContent.paymentType}
   115→            </Text>
   116→          </>
   117→        )}
   118→        {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints !== null && (
   119→          <>
   120→            {renderDivider()}
   121→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   122→              Frete
   123→            </Text>
   124→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   125→              {marketplaceContent.shippingValuePoints}
   126→            </Text>
   127→          </>
   128→        )}
   129→        {marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== undefined && marketplaceContent.valuePoints !== null && (
   130→          <>
   131→            {renderDivider()}
   132→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   133→              Valor total
   134→            </Text>
   135→            <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   136→              {marketplaceContent.valuePoints}
   137→            </Text>
   138→          </>
   139→        )}
   140→        {marketplaceContent.vendorName && (
   141→          <>
   142→            {renderDivider()}
   143→            <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   144→              Parceiro: {marketplaceContent.vendorName}
   145→            </Text>
   146→          </>
   147→        )}
   148→        {marketplaceContent.items.map((item, itemIndex: number) => (
   149→          <CardActivity
   150→            key={itemIndex}
   151→            mt={"nano"}
   152→            title={item.name}
   153→            titleTextType="paragraphMD"
   154→            description={`Quantidade: ${item.quantity}\nValor: ${item.valuePoints}`}
   155→            descriptionTextType="paragraphSM"
   156→            showImage={!!item.cleanedImageUrl}
   157→            image={item.cleanedImageUrl ? { uri: item.cleanedImageUrl } : undefined}
   158→            showIcon={false}
   159→            iconRight={null as any}
   160→            hideBorder={false}
   161→          />
   162→        ))}
   163→
   164→        <Alert
   165→          title='Detalhes da entrega'
   166→          mt="meddium"
   167→          label="Você pode acompanhar a entrega do seu pedido pelo site do parceiro."
   168→          numberOfLines={2}
   169→          type="highlight"
   170→          icon="icon-truck"
   171→          hasIconBackground
   172→          bgIconColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   173→        />
   174→      </>
   175→    );
   176→  };
   177→
   178→  return (
   179→    <>
   180→      <BasicScreen
   181→        title={'Detalhes do pedido'}
   182→        isLoading={isLoading}
   183→        leftIconOnPress={handleGoBack}
   184→        rightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace ? "icon-help" : undefined}
   185→        rightIconOnPress={undefined}
   186→        hasRightIcon={isCashback && !transaction?.marketplace}
   187→        hasScroll
   188→        errorButtonOnPress={() => { }}
   189→      >
   190→      <DetailTransactionValue
   191→          icon={transaction.icon as any}
   192→          title={cardTitle}
   193→          titleColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01"
   194→          iconBgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_03"
   195→          points={formattedPointsValue}
   196→          bgColor="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_02"
   197→          pointsColor={(transaction.type === 'CREDIT' || transaction.type === 'REFUNDED') ? 'PLUS_COLOR_02' : 'INTENSE_COLOR_05' as const}
   198→        />
   199→
   200→        <Box ml='smaller' mr='smaller' mt='xs' flex={1}>
   201→
   202→          <TagLabel
   203→            icon={undefined}
   204→            type="neutral"
   205→            text={highlightText}
   206→            showSpacing
   207→            mb='xs'
   208→          />
   209→
   210→          <Box flex={1} width="100%">
   211→            {showOrderNumber && (
   212→              <>
   213→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs">
   214→                  Número do pedido
   215→                </Text>
   216→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   217→                  #{transaction.id}
   218→                </Text>
   219→              </>
   220→            )}
   221→
   222→            {showStatus && transaction.status && (
   223→              <>
   224→                {renderDivider()}
   225→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   226→                  Status do pedido
   227→                </Text>
   228→                <TagLabel
   229→                  type={STATUS_COLORS[transaction.status] || 'neutral'}
   230→                  text={transaction.status}
   231→                  showSpacing
   232→                />
   233→              </>
   234→            )}
   235→
   236→            {showValue && (
   237→              <>
   238→                {renderDivider()}
   239→                <Text type="paragraphXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xxxxs" mt="xxxxs">
   240→                  Valor
   241→                </Text>
   242→                <Text type="paragraphMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_03">
   243→                  {formattedCurrencyValue}
   244→                </Text>
   245→              </>
   246→            )}
   247→
   248→            {marketplaceContent && renderMarketplaceContent()}
   249→          </Box>
   250→
   251→
   252→          <Box width="100%" align="flex-end" mb="small">
   253→            <Button
   254→              type="ghostLarge"
   255→              text="Relatar Problema"
   256→              onPress={handleOpenReportProblem}
   257→            />
   258→          </Box>
   259→        </Box>
   260→
   261→      </BasicScreen>
   262→
   263→      <BackDropBottom
   264→        modalizeRef={modalizeRef as PropsModalizeRef}
   265→      >
   266→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt="xxs">
   267→          <Box align="center" width="100%">
   268→            <Text type="paragraphXXXL" color="BRAND_COMPLEMENT_01" mb="xs" align="center">
   269→              Central de Atendimento
   270→            </Text>
   271→          </Box>
   272→        </Box>
   273→
   274→        <Box pd="innerSmall">
   275→          <CardActivity
   276→            mt="nano"
   277→            icon="icon-contact"
   278→            title="Capitais"
   279→            description="4002 1552"
   280→            iconRight="icon-next"
   281→            showIcon
   282→            showTagLabel={false}
   283→            onPress={() => {
   284→              eventSelectContent({
   285→                content_type: 'cta',
   286→                content_id: 'telefones_capitais',
   287→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   288→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   289→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   290→              });
   291→              Linking.openURL('tel:40021552');
   292→            }}
   293→          />
   294→
   295→          <CardActivity
   296→            mt="nano"
   297→            icon="icon-contact"
   298→            title="Demais localidades"
   299→            description="0800 015 0252"
   300→            iconRight="icon-next"
   301→            showIcon
   302→            showTagLabel={false}
   303→            onPress={() => {
   304→              eventSelectContent({
   305→                content_type: 'cta',
   306→                content_id: 'telefones_demais_localidades',
   307→                location_1: 'monetizacao',
   308→                location_2: 'hub_recompensas_spmais',
   309→                location_3: 'contato_telefones',
   310→              });
   311→
   312→              Linking.openURL('tel:08000150252');
   313→            }}
   314→          />
   315→          <Text type="paragraphXS" color="INTENSE_COLOR_04" mt='xxxxs'>
   316→            *Atendimento de segunda à sexta das 9h às 21h. Sábado e domingo das 9h às 17h.
   317→          </Text>
   318→
   319→
   320→        </Box>
   321→
   322→        <Box align="center" width="100%" mt='xxxxs'>
   323→          <Text type="linkMD" color="INTENSE_COLOR_05" onPress={handleCloseReportProblem} align="center">
   324→            Fechar
   325→          </Text>
   326→        </Box>
   327→      </BackDropBottom>
   328→
   329→      {isCashback && (
   330→        <BackDropBottom modalHeight={height * 0.30} modalizeRef={modalizeRefInfo as PropsModalizeRef}>
   331→          <Text
   332→            type="paragraphMD"
   333→            align="center"
   334→            color="INTENSE_COLOR_05"
   335→            mt="small"
   336→            mb="smaller"
   337→          >
   338→            Você também pode conferir o valor do desconto nos lançamentos da sua fatura.
   339→          </Text>
   340→
   341→          <Button text="Entendi" onPress={handleCloseInfo} />
   342→        </BackDropBottom>
   343→      )}
   344→    </>
   345→  );
   346→};
   347→
   348→export default MyOrdersDetailView;
   349→
   350→

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.

content.text: Let me also check the STYLE_GUIDE to understand the required patterns.

content.content:
1→# Frontend Style Guide — Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2→
     3→Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4→This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5→
     6→> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ☕
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11→- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12→- [Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13→- [Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14→- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15→- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16→- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17→- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18→- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19→- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20→- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21→- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22→- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23→
    24→---
    25→
    26→## Introduction
    27→
    28→The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    29→
    30→Key decisions:
    31→- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32→- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33→- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34→- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35→
    36→---
    37→
    38→## Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern
    39→
    40→Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41→
    42→```
    43→screens/Home/
    44→├── index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45→├── view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46→└── Models/
    47→    └── index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48→```
    49→
    50→**Models/index.d.ts**
    51→```ts
    52→export interface HomeParams {
    53→  welcome?: string;
    54→}
    55→export interface HomeState {
    56→  greeting: string;
    57→  isLoading: boolean;
    58→}
    59→export interface HomeHandlers {
    60→  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61→}
    62→export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63→```
    64→
    65→**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66→```ts
    67→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68→import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69→import { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70→
    71→export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72→  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74→
    75→  useEffect(() => {
    76→    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77→    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78→  }, []);
    79→
    80→  const greeting = useMemo(
    81→    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82→    [params?.welcome, name]
    83→  );
    84→
    85→  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86→    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87→  }, []);
    88→
    89→  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90→}
    91→```
    92→
    93→**view.tsx (render)**
    94→```tsx
    95→import React from "react";
    96→import { View } from "react-native";
    97→import { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98→import { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99→import type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100→
   101→type Props = HomeParams;
   102→
   103→export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104→  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105→
   106→  if (isLoading) {
   107→    return (
   108→      <View>
   109→        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110→      </View>
   111→    );
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  return (
   115→    <View>
   116→      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117→      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118→    </View>
   119→  );
   120→}
   121→```
   122→
   123→---
   124→
   125→## Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern
   126→
   127→```
   128→atomic/atoms/Button/
   129→├── index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130→├── view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131→└── Models/
   132→    └── index.d.ts
   133→```
   134→
   135→**Models/index.d.ts**
   136→```ts
   137→export interface ButtonProps {
   138→  text: string;
   139→  disabled?: boolean;
   140→  onPress?: () => void;
   141→}
   142→export interface ButtonState {
   143→  pressed: boolean;
   144→}
   145→export interface ButtonHandlers {
   146→  handlePress: () => void;
   147→}
   148→export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149→```
   150→
   151→**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152→```ts
   153→import { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154→import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155→
   156→export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158→
   159→  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160→    setPressed(true);
   161→    props.onPress?.();
   162→    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163→  }, [props.onPress]);
   164→
   165→  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166→}
   167→```
   168→
   169→**view.tsx (render)**
   170→```tsx
   171→import React from "react";
   172→import { Pressable, View } from "react-native";
   173→import { Text } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
   174→import { useButton } from "./index";
   175→import type { ButtonProps } from "./Models";
   176→
   177→export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   178→  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   179→
   180→  return (
   181→    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   182→      <View>
   183→        <Text>{props.text}{pressed ? " •" : ""}</Text>
   184→      </View>
   185→    </Pressable>
   186→  );
   187→}
   188→```
   189→
   190→---
   191→
   192→## Project Organization
   193→
   194→```
   195→src/
   196→├── @types/            # Global TS types
   197→├── assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198→├── atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199→│   ├── atoms/
   200→│   ├── molecules/
   201→│   └── organisms/
   202→├── modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203→├── screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204→├── services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205→│   ├── api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206→│   ├── class/         # Class with logical requests
   207→│   ├── hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208→│   ├── repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209→│   ├── services/      # Business orchestration
   210→│   ├── storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211→│   ├── store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212→│   ├── models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213→│   ├── utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214→│   └── index.ts       # Public exports
   215→├── hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216→├── routes/            # Navigation config
   217→├── settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218→└── utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219→```
   220→
   221→> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222→
   223→---
   224→
   225→## Services Architecture
   226→
   227→**Flow:** `UI → services → repository → api` and `UI → services → store (Zustand)`
   228→
   229→- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.
   230→- **class/**: class with logical requests.
   231→- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232→- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.
   233→- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.
   234→- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.
   235→- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).
   236→- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.
   237→- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238→
   239→Principles:
   240→- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241→- No circular dependencies.
   242→- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243→
   244→---
   245→
   246→## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247→
   248→- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.
   249→- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.
   250→- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.
   251→- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252→
   253→**Slice example**
   254→```ts
   255→import type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256→import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257→
   258→export type AuthSlice = {
   259→    auth: AuthState;
   260→    authActions: AuthActions
   261→};
   262→
   263→const initialAuth = {
   264→    user: null,
   265→    loading: false,
   266→    error: undefined,
   267→}
   268→
   269→export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270→    auth: initialAuth,
   271→    authActions: {
   272→        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273→        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274→        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275→        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276→    }
   277→});
   278→```
   279→
   280→**Root Store**
   281→
   282→- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps — including SuperApp.
   283→
   284→```ts
   285→import { create } from "zustand";
   286→import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287→import { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288→
   289→import { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290→import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291→
   292→import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293→
   294→/** Add your slice Type */
   295→export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296→
   297→export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298→  devtools(
   299→    persist(
   300→      immer((...a) => ({
   301→        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302→        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303→      })),
   304→      {
   305→        name: "root-storage",
   306→        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307→        partialize: (s) => ({
   308→          user: s.user,
   309→          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310→        }),
   311→        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312→      }
   313→    ),
   314→    { name: "RootStore" }
   315→  )
   316→);
   317→```
   318→
   319→- For Use on Class.
   320→
   321→```ts
   322→class Auth {
   323→  private readonly setAuth;
   324→
   325→  constructor () {
   326→    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327→  }
   328→
   329→  function doSomething(data) {
   330→    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331→  }
   332→}
   333→```
   334→
   335→- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336→- UI never imports the store directly — uses selectors
   337→
   338→```ts
   339→const loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340→const token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341→```
   342→
   343→---
   344→
   345→## Routes Naming
   346→
   347→Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:
   348→- ✅ `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)
   349→- ✅ `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350→
   351→---
   352→
   353→## Folder Naming Rules
   354→
   355→| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356→|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357→| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358→| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359→
   360→---
   361→
   362→## Code Standards
   363→
   364→**Language**: English only.  
   365→**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366→
   367→**Explanatory variables**
   368→```js
   369→const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370→const getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371→const isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372→isNumber(1);
   373→```
   374→
   375→**Semantic constants**
   376→```js
   377→const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378→setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379→```
   380→
   381→**Library workarounds with link**
   382→```js
   383→// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384→// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385→event.target.value = "";
   386→```
   387→
   388→**JSDoc**
   389→```js
   390→/**
   391→ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392→ * @param {*} eventName
   393→ * @param {*} maxLength
   394→ */
   395→```
   396→
   397→**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**
   398→```ts
   399→useEffect(() => {
   400→  (async () => {
   401→    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402→    setSum(42);
   403→  })();
   404→}, [
   405→  setSum,
   406→]);
   407→```
   408→
   409→**Extract conditions**
   410→```ts
   411→const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412→if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413→```
   414→
   415→**Optional chaining**
   416→```ts
   417→const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418→```
   419→
   420→**JSX indentation**
   421→```tsx
   422→{
   423→  !isEnd && (
   424→    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425→  )
   426→}
   427→```
   428→
   429→**Early returns**
   430→```ts
   431→if (!data) return null;
   432→return <View />;
   433→```
   434→
   435→**Nullish coalescing**
   436→```ts
   437→return data ?? 0;
   438→```
   439→---
   440→
   441→## Styles Patterns
   442→
   443→- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.
   444→- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445→
   446→---
   447→
   448→## Cache Pattern
   449→
   450→Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451→
   452→```ts
   453→import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454→
   455→export interface CachedData<T> {
   456→  timestamp: number;
   457→  data: T;
   458→}
   459→
   460→export interface StorageContract<T> {
   461→  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462→  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463→  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464→}
   465→
   466→export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467→  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468→
   469→  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470→    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471→    if (!json) return null;
   472→    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473→  }
   474→
   475→  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476→    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477→    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478→  }
   479→
   480→  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481→    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482→  }
   483→}
   484→```
   485→
   486→**Guidelines**
   487→- One storage class per module/feature.
   488→- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489→- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490→- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491→- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492→
   493→---
   494→
   495→## Checklist
   496→
   497→- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498→- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499→- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500→- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501→- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502→- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503→- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504→
   505→---
   506→
   507→Happy shipping! 🚀

<system-reminder>
Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content.text:
## Analysis Report: Order Details (Detalhes do Pedido) Feature

### Screen Structure & Hook Component Pattern

**MyOrdersDetails Screen:**
- **Location:** `/src/screens/MyOrdersDetails/`
- **Structure:** Follows Hook Component pattern correctly
  - `index.tsx` - Logic hook with component exports
  - `view.tsx` - View-only component
  - `Models/index.ts` - Type definitions
  - `utils.ts` - Utility functions

**Compliance:** ✅ Correct structure. However, the **file naming is non-standard**:
- Should be: `Models/index.d.ts` (per STYLE_GUIDE)
- Currently: `Models/index.ts` (exports runtime constants + types mixed)

**MyOrdersRewardProgram (Cashback) Screen:**
- **Location:** `/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/`
- **File naming issues:**
  - Component file: `index.tsx` instead of following Hook Component pattern
  - Missing separate logic hook file (index.ts should be the hook, not the component)
  - Models file: `models/index.ts` (should be `Models/index.d.ts` per STYLE_GUIDE convention)

---

### Dependencies & Imports

**MyOrdersDetails (index.tsx):**
```ts
// ✅ Correct imports
import { useFocusEffect, useNavigation } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { useShallow } from "zustand/react/shallow";
import { useRootStore } from '../../store';
import { getOrderDetail } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
import { formatToCurrency } from '../../utils/functions';
import { moment } from '../../services/moment';

// ✅ Analytics events via ~ alias
import { eventScreenViewV3, eventModalView, eventSelectContent } from '~/constants/functions';
```

**Issues:**
- `moment` is imported from `../../services/moment` (local service)
- No type issues detected; uses `useShallow` optimization correctly

**MyOrdersRewardProgram (index.tsx):**
```ts
import { useRootStore } from '../../store';
import { getPointsExtract } from '../../store/rewardProgram/services';
import { eventSelectContent, eventScreenViewV3 } from '~/constants/functions';
```

**Issue:** ⚠️ Uses `useShallow` selector but declared with generic state slice in line 25-29 instead of using explicit selector pattern.

---

### Business Logic & Handlers

**MyOrdersDetails Logic (index.tsx lines 47-210):**

1. **Screen Initialization:**
   - Tracking with `hasFocused` ref to fire analytics only once
   - Analytics event: `eventScreenViewV3('detalhe_pedido', ...)`
   - Fetches order detail via `getOrderDetail({ transactionId })`
   - Cleanup: resets state on unmount

2. **Data Enrichment (lines 125-134):**
   ```ts
   const enrichedTransaction = transaction ? {
     ...transaction,
     type: isValidTransactionType(passedType) ? passedType : transaction.type,
     icon: passedIcon || transaction.icon,
     status: passedStatus || transaction.status,
     details: { ...transaction.details, provider: passedOrigination || transaction.details?.provider || '' }
   } : undefined;
   ```
   - Merges route params with fetched data
   - Handles transaction type validation

3. **Data Processing (useMemo, lines 138-210):**
   - Formats points value, currency, and highlight text
   - Detects marketplace orders vs. regular transactions
   - Transforms marketplace data structure (orders → items, payments → payment type)
   - Controls visibility flags (`showOrderNumber`, `showStatus`, `showValue`)

4. **Handlers:**
   - `handleGoBack()` - Simple navigation
   - `handleOpenReportProblem()` - Fires events, opens modal
   - `handleCloseReportProblem()` - Closes modal
   - `handleOpenInfo()` / `handleCloseInfo()` - Cashback info modal
   - `handleRetry()` - Refetches order detail

**Potential Issues:**
- ⚠️ **Type Guard Logic (line 121-123):**
  ```ts
  const isValidTransactionType = (type: string | undefined): type is TransactionType => {
    return type === 'CREDIT' || type === 'RESCUE' || type === 'EXPIRED' || type === 'REFUNDED';
  };
  ```
  This is fragile; if `TransactionType` adds new types, this guard fails silently.

- ⚠️ **Missing Dependency in useMemo (line 210):**
  ```ts
  }, [enrichedTransaction]);
  ```
  `enrichedTransaction` depends on `passedType`, `passedIcon`, `passedStatus`, `passedOrigination`, and `transaction`. The dependency array only includes the derived value, making it miss direct upstream changes. Should depend on the original route params directly.

**MyOrdersRewardProgram Logic (index.tsx):**

1. **State Management:**
   - Tracks `isRefreshing` locally via `useState`
   - Uses Zustand for `pointsExtract` data (orders list)

2. **Data Transformation:**
   - Formats dates with `date-fns` (parseISO + format)
   - Maps transaction to CardVehicleTags format

3. **Handlers:**
   - `handleDetailsOrders()` - Navigates to detail screen, passes transaction metadata
   - `handleRefresh()` - Calls API with type filter
   - `handleOpenFilters()` / `handleGoBack()` - Navigation

**Issue:** ⚠️ **Missing dependency in useFocusEffect (line 137):**
```ts
}, [])  // Should include hasFocused or dependencies
```
The hasFocused ref is mutated inside the callback but eslint-plugin-react-hooks won't catch it (refs are exempt). However, the closure is clean.

---

### Utils Functions (utils.ts)

**Transaction Gain Type Detection (lines 5-26):**
```ts
const getTransactionGainType = (): TransactionGainType
```
- Detects 'CASHBACK', 'TAG', or 'CARD' based on provider/icon/description
- Hard-coded string arrays for tag indicators

**Formatting Functions:**
- `getFormattedPointsValue()` - Adds +/- prefix, pluralizes "ponto/pontos"
- `getFormattedHighlightText()` - Formats date with moment (PT-BR locale)
- `getFormattedPointsValueForMarketplace()` - Marketplace-specific formatting
- `getPaymentTypeLabel()` - Maps payment types to labels
- `getMarketplaceTitle()` - Generates dynamic title from items (e.g., "Item 1 e Item 2" or "Item 1, Item 2 e outros 5")
- `getCleanedImageUrl()` - Strips `imageUrl:` prefix, validates HTTP/HTTPS

**Issues:**
- ⚠️ **No JSDoc comments** on exported functions (violates STYLE_GUIDE)
- ⚠️ **Hard-coded Portuguese strings** scattered throughout (line 41: "Pedido feito em...")
- ⚠️ **Fragile image URL cleaning** (line 88-89): assumes specific prefix format

---

### View Components

**MyOrdersDetailView (view.tsx):**

1. **Error State (lines 35-50):**
   - Shows `ApiError` component with retry button

2. **Loading State (lines 52-65):**
   - Spinner-based loading indicator

3. **Content Rendering (lines 71-248):**
   - `DetailTransactionValue` - Header card
   - Order number, status, value display (conditional)
   - **Marketplace Content (lines 83-176):**
     - Order number, status badge, payment type, shipping, total
     - Items list with images and quantities
     - Delivery tracking alert

4. **Modals:**
   - `BackDropBottom` for "Report Problem" (support contact numbers)
   - Cashback info modal (conditional on `isCashback`)

**Issues:**
- ⚠️ **No error boundary** for view component
- ⚠️ **Type casting with `as any`** (lines 101, 191, 264) - bypasses TypeScript safety
- ⚠️ **Hardcoded strings** (lines 89, 110, 144, etc.) - not i18n-compatible
- ⚠️ **Empty onPress handlers** (line 40, 188) - should handle errors gracefully

**MyOrdersCashbackView (view.tsx):**

- Clean FlatList rendering with refresh control
- Skeleton loading state
- Empty state with image
- Filter bottom sheet integration

**Issue:** ⚠️ **Incomplete filter implementation (line 128):**
```ts
onApplyFilters={() => { }}  // Empty handler
```

---

### STYLE_GUIDE Compliance Matrix

| Check | MyOrdersDetails | MyOrdersRewardProgram | Status |
|-------|-----------------|----------------------|--------|
| Hook Component Pattern | ✅ Partial | ❌ No | VIOLATION |
| Models folder structure | ⚠️ index.ts instead of .d.ts | ⚠️ models/ not Models/ | VIOLATION |
| English naming only | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | OK |
| Zustand for global state | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | OK |
| No direct API calls | ✅ Correct | ✅ Correct | OK |
| JSDoc comments | ❌ No | N/A | VIOLATION |
| No `as any` type casting | ❌ Multiple instances | N/A | VIOLATION |
| Dependency arrays correct | ⚠️ useMemo deps incomplete | ⚠️ useFocusEffect deps | WARNING |
| Folder case convention | ❌ MyOrdersDetails, MyOrdersRewardProgram | ✅ Mixed (models/Models) | VIOLATION |

---

### Critical Issues Summary

**High Priority:**
1. **MyOrdersRewardProgram** doesn't follow Hook Component pattern (logic not separated from view)
2. **Type casting `as any`** in view components (lines 101, 191, 264)
3. **Missing JSDoc** on utils functions
4. **Incomplete dependency arrays** in useMemo and useFocusEffect

**Medium Priority:**
5. Hardcoded Portuguese strings throughout (not i18n-compatible)
6. **Models folder naming inconsistency** (should be `Models/index.d.ts`, not `Models/index.ts` or `models/index.ts`)
7. Fragile type guard for `TransactionType`
8. Image URL cleaning assumes specific format

**Low Priority:**
9. Empty filter handlers
10. No error boundaries in views
